description: Task Import Template for 100 Days of Python

format.title: String
format.starter_code: String - Initial code provided to student
format.expected_output: String or null - Expected result for validation
format.hint: String - Helpful hint for stuck students

example.title: Lambda Functions
example.description: Create a lambda function that squares a number and use it with map() to square a list of numbers.
example.starter_code:
numbers = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]

# Create lambda and use map
example.hint: Use square = lambda x: x**2, then list(map(square, numbers))
